documents.title: Basic Plan
documents.content: AutoStream Basic Plan costs $29 per month and includes 10 videos per month with 720p resolution.

documents.title: Pro Plan
documents.content: AutoStream Pro Plan costs $79 per month and includes unlimited videos, 4K resolution, and AI captions.

documents.title: Refund Policy
documents.content: AutoStream does not provide refunds after 7 days from the purchase date.

documents.title: Support Policy
documents.content: AutoStream offers 24/7 support only for customers on the Pro plan.
